name: save_comment
description: Create or update a comment on a Linear issue. If `id` is provided, updates the existing comment; otherwise creates a new one. When creating, `issueId` and `body` are required.

id.description: Comment ID. If provided, updates the existing comment

issueId.description: Issue ID or identifier (e.g., LIN-123) (required when creating)

parentId.description: Parent comment ID (for replies, only when creating)

body.description: Content as Markdown. Do not escape the string — use literal newlines and special characters, not escape sequences
